2024-06-07.thesis: MSCI India Index August rebalancing expected to trigger $5.2B inflows into HDFC Bank
2024-06-07.exit_case: Modi's election setback prompts India playbook revisions, potentially diluting expected MSCI inflows into HDFC Bank.
2024-06-07.assessment: The MSCI India Index August rebalancing catalyst remains pending with no direct news this week. Indian market focus has shifted to RBI policy and post-election political adjustments under Modi's narrower victory, which may introduce volatility but do not yet impact the rebalancing event. HDFC Bank continues to be favored by analysts, but broader sentiment is cautious.
2024-06-07.exit_advice: Monitor for MSCI announcements and political developments that could alter inflow expectations; consider exit if rebalancing is canceled, reduced, or HDFC Bank inclusion is jeopardized.

2024-09-13.thesis: Federal Court of Australia approves acquisition of Base Resources.
2024-09-13.exit_case: The Federal Court approved the Base Resources acquisition on Sep 12 — the catalyst is fully resolved and public.
2024-09-13.assessment: THE CATALYST ALREADY HAPPENED THIS WEEK. On 2024-09-12 the Federal Court of Australia approved Energy Fuels' acquisition of Base Resources — the exact discrete event I entered on. I cannot even construct a first-week journal entry because there is nothing left to wait for. The approval is public, the news is out, the stock will price this in immediately if it hasn't already. The Oct 2 closing is a formality, not a catalyst. There is no second act here. I never had an edge because I entered on the same day the catalyst resolved. This is a textbook case of chasing a headline, not anticipating one.
2024-09-13.exit_advice: Exit immediately. The catalyst is resolved — court approval granted 2024-09-12. Do not wait for Oct 2 formal close, which is a non-event certainty. There is no pending binary outcome left to express a view on. Move to the next idea.
